scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build:windows-client: npm run build --prefix client && npm install --prefix desktop/windows && npm run build --prefix desktop/windows && npm run pack:zip --prefix desktop/windows
scripts.start: npm run build --prefix client && npm run start --prefix server
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm test
